emotional_tone: Premium, authoritative, trustworthy, deeply rooted in modern African digital identity.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol: Base md:grid-cols-12, wide gap-8 for marketing. For dashboards, tight gap-4 with 1px structural borders.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing. Internal card padding at least p-6. Marketing sections py-24 or py-32.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Subtle roundness. rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for marketing, rounded-xl for dashboard. 1px solid stroke with rgba(255,255,255,0.08) on all cards.
layout_and_spacing.glassmorphism: Used selectively on sticky navs and dialogs. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#1A1A2E]/60 border-b border-white/10. No muddy grays.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_specific: Linear-style one-dimensional scrolling. High density but structured. Use sidebars and tabs. No 'center-everything'. Left-align paragraphs and dense content.

components_strategy.general: Hybrid rule. Custom HTML+Tailwind for Marketing. Heavily customized Shadcn UI for Dashboard/App.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA in African Green (#00C853) with text '#0F0F1A' (for contrast), no gradient, sharp or max rounded-lg. Hover: scale-up slightly with soft green glow shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,200,83,0.3)].
components_strategy.cards: Surface #1A1A2E background. 1px border-[#FFFFFF/10]. On hover, -translate-y-1, border changes to rgba(255,214,0,0.3) (Gold hint).
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use structural strokes instead of just fills. Line charts with #00C853 (Green) and #FFD600 (Gold) against #0F0F1A grid.
components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn based. bg-[#0F0F1A] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#00C853] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00C853]. left aligned.
components_strategy.navigation: Left sidebar for dashboard (collapsible). Fixed top glass nav for marketing page.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state (e.g., text color brightens, border glows, subtle translate).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Skeleton loaders with pulse animation matching surface color, or subtle glowing trace on borders.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or line, maintaining 1.5px stroke weight.

images_and_media.description: 3D abstract geometric structure with gold lines and black polygons. Use as subtle background in Hero section with heavy radial gradient overlay (#0F0F1A to transparent) to ensure text readability.
Abstract green/blue light streaks on dark. Use for the features section background to break up solid void navy.
African business professional in suit, arms crossed. Use for top tier testimonial.
African woman professional standing. Use for secondary testimonial.
WhatsApp generic icon asset. Use for agent builder preview header.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over #0F0F1A or #1A1A2E meets 4.5:1. Primary green #00C853 needs dark text (#0F0F1A) inside buttons for max contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Visible focus rings required: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00C853] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0F0F1A].

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure tailwind.config.js with the provided custom colors (#0F0F1A, #1A1A2E, #00C853, #FFD600), Cabinet Grotesk font, and animation states.
3. Implement the Landing Page using custom raw HTML/Tailwind for bento-box layouts and overlapping elements. Apply the 3D abstract background image in the hero.
4. Implement Dashboard layout (Linear-style: Left Sidebar, Top Header, high density F/Z pattern). Use customized Shadcn UI heavily here.
5. For Recharts in Dashboard, remove default axes lines where possible, use #00C853 and #FFD600 strokes with strokeWidth={2}, and #1A1A2E for tooltips.
6. Build Agent Builder with an interactive chat preview resembling WhatsApp UI on the right, configuration form on the left.
7. DO NOT use generic placeholder text (Lorem Ipsum) or missing placeholder images. Use the precise media provided.
8. Ensure the 'African tech identity' is felt through the palette, high contrast, and the storytelling/copy without being clichéd.
